heading: Applicability of subchapter
label: 5197d Applicability of subchapter
text: The provisions of this subchapter shall be applicable to the United States, its States, Territories and possessions, and the District of Columbia, and their political subdivisions.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 2259 of the former Appendix to Title 50, War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–337, § 3412(a)
